prompt: The JFrame window does not appear. What is the bug?
choices: JFrame requires a JPanel to be visible
setVisible(true) is never called; frames are invisible by default
setSize must be called after setVisible for the frame to appear
EXIT_ON_CLOSE prevents the frame from being shown
explanation: JFrames are invisible by default. setVisible(true) must be called to make the window appear on screen. This is one of the most common beginners' mistakes with Swing. The program completes without error because creating an invisible JFrame is perfectly valid.
